forbidden_scope: GH-105 result/failure envelope output beyond existing Run Record failure fields
Harbor SDK/runtime calls, browser launches, live sessions, evidence retrieval, or Harbor package imports
Harbor, Lode, App, or other repository changes
Harbor private fields or raw evidence bodies
FR #95 closeout before GH-105 is complete

integration_evidence.summary: Read Harbor main public runtime, page-scene, viewer, smoke, and test facts for Core-consumable refs.
Validates Harbor public CoreRuntimeFacts and CoreSceneReference refs, rejects private/raw fields, and maps missing/unavailable runtime/evidence states to structured failures.
Requires Harbor admission after Lode admission and before accepted Run Record creation; creates failed Run Records for trusted Task Intent with invalid Harbor refs.
Adds optional admission.runtime_binding_refs and admission.evidence_refs so Core records Harbor refs at admission and top-level Run Record fields.
Validates accepted Harbor binding, missing runtime ref failure, capture denied evidence failure, and refs-only storage.
Validates schema fixtures and Run Record store conformance with admission-level Harbor runtime/evidence refs.

suite_path_consumption.rationale: Narrow Core runtime PR that consumes already-merged Harbor public refs and self-check/conformance coverage without result projection, query APIs, generated clients, storage backends, live Harbor calls, or cross-repo edits.
suite_path_consumption.consumer_boundary: Review and PR Ready consume Harbor source facts, the Core harbor-admission helper, Run Record admission schema, fixtures, core/conformance self-check output, GH-104 carrier, local build/typecheck/test/lint/conformance output, PR metadata readback, and hosted checks.
suite_path_consumption.recheck_condition: Upgrade to broader suite artifacts when result envelope projection, evidence retrieval, API submit/query routes, generated types, CLI/MCP/SDK/App integration, database storage, hosted service storage, or true-write guardrails are added.

commands.note: Validated Run Record file store and read-only task submission admission including Harbor runtime/evidence ref binding.
Validated API server self-check, Core Run Record and task submission self-check, schema fixtures, and conformance fixtures.
Installed surface passed; doctor reported stale global CLI version v0.25.0 vs latest 0.26.2 as advisory.
Minimal suite path with spec, plan, evidence-map, and task carrier present.
Build flow found integrated execution evidence and can proceed toward review.

tooling_notes.note: Installed CLI v0.25.0 blocked with suite validate/carrier CLI JSON unavailable and an unreadable .loom/tmp artifact locator; packaged source-runtime flow build passed for the same item and evidence.

validation.recheck_condition: Rerun full local validation, Loom suite/fact-chain/build flow, PR metadata readback, and hosted checks after every push.
